description_long: This is a stylized, fantasy-inspired sword with a predominantly purple coloration and a dramatic, angular blade. The blade is broad, single-edged, and curves sharply near the tip, giving it a menacing appearance. The central section of the blade features raised, gear-like motifs, adding a mechanical or magical aesthetic. The handle is robust and slightly curved, with a textured grip and a pointed pommel, suggesting both functionality and ornamentation. The guard is integrated into the design, flaring outward with sculpted, wing-like extensions. The overall finish is matte with subtle highlights, and the sword appears to be crafted from a solid, metallic material.
description: A stylized purple sword with a broad, angular, curved blade and gear-like motifs, featuring a textured, curved handle and integrated guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the sword, with the blade's width, gear-like motifs, and the symmetrical, winged guard clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pronounced curve and thickness of the blade, as well as the ergonomic curve of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the blade and handle, with the gear-like motifs running down the center and the overall symmetry of the design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the blade's angular profile and the sculpted details along the handle and guard.
attribute_handle_design: curved, textured grip, pointed pommel, solid construction
